dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're approaching turbulence, gentlemen. Please fasten your seatbelts."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Turbulence? No problem. I've been through worse than this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes fixed on the controls.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, tell me about it, kid. I once rode a tornado through the Midwest."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, a mischievous glint in his eye.

dialogue.speaker: ABEEHA
dialogue.line: "Gentlemen, I assure you, we're in good hands. Captain Ali has years of experience."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a sly grin spreading across his face.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're experiencing severe turbulence. Hold on, everyone!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "Whoa, this is crazy! I've never seen anything like it!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, sweat beading on his forehead.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "This is awesome! We're actually flying through a storm!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes wide with fear and exhilaration.

dialogue.speaker: ABEEHA
dialogue.line: "Gentlemen, please remain calm. The captain is doing everything he can to keep us safe."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, a whoop of excitement on his lips.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "We're through the worst of it, gentlemen. I think we'll be okay."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes sunken with fatigue.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, sorry about that. We didn't mean to cause any trouble."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, a sheepish grin on his face.

dialogue.speaker: ABEEHA
dialogue.line: "Gentlemen, please, no need to apologize. We're just glad to have made it through safely."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, a contrite expression on his face.
